Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a list of 18 events from hospital processes We need to infer the case groupings There are three distinct patients based on patient_age and patient_gender Lets list the events and try to group them by patient Patient 1 age 45 gender M Patient 2 age 62 gender F Patient 3 age 28 gender M

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: But note there could be multiple patients with same age and gender Possibly but from the context it is likely that each distinct patient has a unique combination of age and gender in this dataset However we should also consider the department and activity flow to see if they are consistent

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets list each event with patient identifier age gender and activity in order Event 1 45 M Register patient ER Event 2 62 F Register patient ER Event 3 28 M Register patient Surgery Event 4 45 M Initial triage ER Event 5 62 F Initial triage ER Event 6 28 M Doctor consultation Surgery Event 7 45 M Xray imaging Radiology Event 8 62 F Lab test requested ER Event 9 28 M Surgery preparation Surgery Event 10 62 F Lab test completed Laboratory Event 11 62 F Doctor consultation ER Event 12 45 M Doctor consultation ER Event 13 28 M Surgery performed Surgery Event 14 62 F Prescription created ER Event 15 45 M Patient discharged ER Event 16 28 M Recovery room Surgery Event 17 62 F Patient discharged ER Event 18 28 M Patient discharged Surgery

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now we can group by patient Patient 45 M Event 1 Register patient ER Event 4 Initial triage ER Event 7 Xray imaging Radiology Event 12 Doctor consultation ER Event 15 Patient discharged ER Patient 62 F Event 2 Register patient ER Event 5 Initial triage ER Event 8 Lab test requested ER Event 10 Lab test completed Laboratory Event 11 Doctor consultation ER Event 14 Prescription created ER Event 17 Patient discharged ER Patient 28 M Event 3 Register patient Surgery Event 6 Doctor consultation Surgery Event 9 Surgery preparation Surgery Event 13 Surgery performed Surgery Event 16 Recovery room Surgery Event 18 Patient discharged Surgery

Name: Validation - PE
Text: These groups seem consistent in terms of flow For example For 45 M Registration triage Xray consultation diagnosis of hairline fracture discharge For 62 F Registration triage lab test requested lab test completed consultation diagnosis of minor infection prescription discharge For 28 M Registration doctor consultation for scheduled knee surgery surgery preparation surgery performed recovery discharge

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The departments also align 45 M and 62 F are ER patients while 28 M is a Surgery patient from start

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We should also check if there are any cross patient interactions No each event is clearly tied to one patient via attributes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus we have three distinct cases We can assign case IDs arbitrarily but the task is to infer the case groupings Therefore the answer There are 3 cases Case 1 Patient age 45 gender M ER visit Case 2 Patient age 62 gender F ER visit Case 3 Patient age 28 gender M Surgery visit We can list the events for each case in chronological order
